Goal: Every upstream source and asset boundary is documented.
Exit Criteria: GPL repo, dependency audit and provenance gates pass.

Goal: All mandatory dependencies boot and EGO API is available.
Exit Criteria: Clean client/server boot and no classloading errors.

Goal: One civic identity attaches to all supported host families.
Exit Criteria: Persistence, repair and adapter tests pass.

Goal: External residents participate in colony, home, job and logistics.
Exit Criteria: Recruit, assign, request and reload scenario passes.

Goal: MCA family and relationship truth remains intact.
Exit Criteria: No duplicate social graph and family persistence passes.

Goal: Supported hosts can follow, guard, patrol, equip and level.
All four pillars work together during drought and raid.
Jobs, requests, reservations, couriers and schedules are reliable.
Residents perform configured work recipes at existing stations.
Exit Criteria: Recipe, quality and rollback tests pass.

Goal: Culture, reputation, dynamic value and contracts are playable.
Exit Criteria: Bounded economy and explainable reputation pass.

Goal: Military hierarchy, raid response and civilian shelter work.
Exit Criteria: Combat policy and raid scenario pass.

Goal: Households, education, governance, law and migration persist.
Crises and diplomacy connect survival to politics.
Exit Criteria: Crisis chains are bounded and recoverable.

Goal: Dashboards, configuration and simulation tiers are release quality.
Exit Criteria: Performance budgets and config migrations pass.

Goal: Technical, legal, source and documentation gates are complete.
Exit Criteria: Reproducible jar/source release and matrix tests pass.
